status.recommended_claim: PQS is not calibrated yet. The lab can support a PQS shadow benchmark or a limited modern-period benchmark only after period-correct roster, rating, unavailability, fatigue, and team-key mapping data are supplied.

recommended_schema_files.purpose: Defines one timestamped team-level snapshot for the team database used by PQS shadow benchmarks.

fields.name: snapshot_id
fields.purpose: Stable identifier for a frozen teams_db snapshot.

fields.name: snapshot_date
fields.purpose: Date when ratings and roster data are valid or frozen; prevents look-ahead leakage.

fields.name: team_key
fields.purpose: Canonical key used to join team snapshot, player ratings, rosters, unavailable players, and fixtures.

fields.name: team_name
fields.purpose: Human-readable team name in teams_db.

fields.name: has_data
fields.purpose: Indicates whether player-level data are available.

fields.name: starting_pqs
fields.purpose: Fallback or precomputed starting XI PQS for teams without detailed roster evaluation.

fields.name: bench_pqs
fields.purpose: Fallback or precomputed bench quality used by fatigue and depth logic.

fields.name: fifa_points
fields.purpose: Optional product-side rating input; not a replacement for calibrated Elo in the lab.

fields.name: style
fields.purpose: Optional tactical style label for future shadow analysis; should be disabled in first PQS benchmark unless explicitly tested.

fields.name: source
fields.purpose: Data source or export process used to create the snapshot.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Free-form caveats about coverage, rating source, or known missing data.

recommended_schema_files.purpose: Defines player-level ratings inside a timestamped teams_db snapshot.

fields.name: snapshot_id
fields.purpose: Joins each player record to a frozen team snapshot.

fields.name: snapshot_date
fields.purpose: Date ratings are valid; must be on or before evaluated matches.

fields.name: team_key
fields.purpose: Canonical team key.

fields.name: player_id
fields.purpose: Stable player identifier; avoids fuzzy name-only joins.

fields.name: player_name
fields.purpose: Display name and fallback matching field.

fields.name: position
fields.purpose: Used to split offensive and defensive PQS.

fields.name: overall
fields.purpose: Optional raw player overall rating used by some product logic.

fields.name: efficiency_score
fields.purpose: Primary PQS player quality input used for active roster sorting and attack/defense averages.

fields.name: rating_source
fields.purpose: Provenance for player rating data.

fields.name: rating_timestamp
fields.purpose: Timestamp of rating extraction or publication.

fields.name: is_in_squad_pool
fields.purpose: Indicates whether the player belongs to the tournament squad pool.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Known data caveats.

recommended_schema_files.purpose: Defines match-level roster, starting XI, and bench availability for reproducible active PQS.

fields.name: match_id
fields.purpose: Join key to fixture or historical match row.

fields.name: match_date
fields.purpose: Used for time-safe snapshot selection.

fields.name: team_key
fields.purpose: Canonical team key.

fields.name: player_id
fields.purpose: Stable player identifier.

fields.name: player_name
fields.purpose: Display name for diagnostics.

fields.name: roster_status
fields.purpose: Defines whether the player is a known starter, bench player, squad member, or absent from the match squad.

fields.name: position
fields.purpose: Required for attack/defense PQS split.

fields.name: source
fields.purpose: Roster or lineup source.

fields.name: lineup_confirmed
fields.purpose: Distinguishes confirmed lineup from projected squad.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Coverage caveats or late changes.

recommended_schema_files.purpose: Defines match-level unavailable players for injury, suspension, and other absences.

fields.name: match_id
fields.purpose: Join key to match.

fields.name: match_date
fields.purpose: Used to verify absence information was available before kickoff.

fields.name: team_key
fields.purpose: Canonical team key.

fields.name: player_id
fields.purpose: Stable player identifier when available.

fields.name: player_name
fields.purpose: Name used for active roster exclusion and diagnostics.

fields.name: unavailable_reason
fields.purpose: Reason for exclusion.

fields.name: status_confidence
fields.purpose: Confidence level for pre-match availability.

fields.name: reported_at
fields.purpose: Timestamp proving the information was known before the prediction.

fields.name: source
fields.purpose: Injury or availability source.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Additional context.

recommended_schema_files.purpose: Defines pre-match fatigue state used by PQS shadow benchmarks.

fields.name: match_id
fields.purpose: Join key to fixture.

fields.name: match_date
fields.purpose: Date of match.

fields.name: team_key
fields.purpose: Canonical team key.

fields.name: pre_match_fatigue
fields.purpose: Fatigue value available before the match; should be reproducible from prior matches or explicitly provided.

fields.name: fatigue_method
fields.purpose: Method used to compute fatigue, such as product_v4_legacy, manual_snapshot, or disabled.

fields.name: prior_matches_counted
fields.purpose: Number of prior tournament matches included in fatigue calculation.

fields.name: extra_time_prior
fields.purpose: Number of prior extra-time matches included.

fields.name: bench_pqs_used
fields.purpose: Bench PQS used to compute fatigue increment.

fields.name: source
fields.purpose: Source of fatigue state or calculation.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Caveats.

recommended_schema_files.purpose: Maps FIFA / international_results team names to teams_db keys.

fields.name: source_team_name
fields.purpose: Team name as it appears in match results or fixtures.

fields.name: source_system
fields.purpose: Name source, such as international_results, FIFA, or product_fixture.

fields.name: team_key
fields.purpose: Canonical teams_db key.

fields.name: teams_db_name
fields.purpose: Team name used in teams_db snapshot.

fields.name: valid_from
fields.purpose: Start date for this mapping when names change over time.

fields.name: valid_to
fields.purpose: End date for this mapping when names change over time.

fields.name: mapping_confidence
fields.purpose: Join confidence level.

fields.name: notes
fields.purpose: Name-change or ambiguity notes.

minimum_viable_pqs_shadow_benchmark_data.description: Minimum data needed to run a reproducible PQS shadow benchmark for 2026 World Cup fixtures without claiming historical calibration.
not_sufficient_for: retrospective 2024 validation unless period-correct 2024 snapshots are available
injury-sensitive tuning unless pre-match unavailable player data are available

look_ahead_bias_risks.risk: Using a 2026 squad snapshot to evaluate Euro 2024 or Copa America 2024 matches.
look_ahead_bias_risks.impact: Player ratings, transfers, retirements, development, injuries, and squad selection are known after the evaluated matches.
look_ahead_bias_risks.mitigation: Require snapshot_date and rating_timestamp to be on or before match_date.

look_ahead_bias_risks.risk: Using confirmed starting XI after kickoff as if it were pre-match information.
look_ahead_bias_risks.impact: Improves roster precision using information that may not be available at prediction time.
look_ahead_bias_risks.mitigation: Store reported_at and lineup_confirmed; separate pre-kickoff projected roster from post-announcement confirmed lineup.

look_ahead_bias_risks.risk: Using unavailable player reports published after the match.
look_ahead_bias_risks.impact: Backfills injury information unavailable to the model at prediction time.
look_ahead_bias_risks.mitigation: Require reported_at before kickoff for unavailable_players rows.

look_ahead_bias_risks.risk: Using tournament performance boosts from completed matches to predict earlier matches.
look_ahead_bias_risks.impact: Leaks outcomes into player efficiency scores.
look_ahead_bias_risks.mitigation: Disable performance boosts in calibration unless they are rebuilt chronologically from prior matches only.

look_ahead_bias_risks.risk: Using current team_key mappings without historical validity windows.
look_ahead_bias_risks.impact: Can mis-map historical or renamed teams.
look_ahead_bias_risks.mitigation: Use valid_from and valid_to for ambiguous or historical mappings.

avoid_2026_squad_for_2024_validation.rule: For any evaluated match, only snapshots with snapshot_date <= match_date are eligible.
avoid_2026_squad_for_2024_validation.recommended_selection: Use the latest eligible snapshot before the match; if no eligible snapshot exists, exclude the match from PQS validation.
avoid_2026_squad_for_2024_validation.validation_scope: Euro 2024 validation requires a Euro 2024-era snapshot; 2026 World Cup shadow benchmark can use a 2026 pre-tournament snapshot.
avoid_2026_squad_for_2024_validation.reporting_requirement: Every benchmark should report snapshot_id, snapshot_date, match_date range, excluded matches due to missing snapshots, and coverage by team.

pqs_as_shadow_additive_layer.principle: PQS should be added as an xG adjustment layer for shadow comparison, not as a replacement for calibrated Elo or calibrated neutral xG.

recommended_first_benchmark_scope.reason: It can use a period-correct 2026 pre-tournament teams_db snapshot without pretending to validate historical PQS.
recommended_first_benchmark_scope.evaluation_type: drift and QA comparison until real outcomes are available
metrics: team-level largest PQS boosts and penalties

go_no_go.recommended_next_step: Create schema templates and a PQS shadow benchmark framework that reads frozen snapshots and reports drift versus final_worldcup_model_v1_candidate.
